zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空格局
zh.content:
瑞波币/美元当前呈弱势震荡格局，价格运行于20日均线1.13743下方，短线反弹动能不足，整体空头结构占优延续中运行。  

MACD指标维持轻微负值运行，动能柱偏弱，未见明显金叉信号，RSI缺失但从价格结构看仍处于偏低区域整理阶段偏弱运行中。  

下方支撑关注1.1320附近，若跌破或进一步测试1.1300区域；上方阻力集中于1.1374-1.1377，需放量突破确认区间。  

操作上建议观望为主，等待价格有效突破1.1374或跌破1.1320后再顺势跟进，避免在窄幅震荡中追单。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is trading around 1.13255, effectively at the lower boundary of its 24h range, indicating mild intraday weakness. Price action suggests a short-term bearish bias as it remains below the 20-period SMA at 1.13743. The inability to sustain levels above the moving average reflects fading bullish momentum and a transition into consolidation with a slight downward drift. Market structure favors cautious positioning until clearer directional strength emerges.

Momentum indicators reinforce this view, with MACD printing a negative value of -0.0029986713, signaling ongoing downside pressure despite the absence of a visible signal line. Without RSI data, confirmation relies more heavily on price behavior and moving averages, which currently show rejection beneath short-term equilibrium. The SMA20 acting as overhead resistance highlights a lack of bullish follow-through, suggesting sellers remain marginally in control in this phase.

Immediate support is located at 1.13255, aligning with the current low and psychological intraday floor. A break below this level could expose the next support zone near 1.1300, followed by deeper consolidation levels if selling accelerates. On the upside, resistance is firmly placed at 1.13743, with additional barriers around 1.1400 to 1.1450 where prior congestion and liquidity pockets may slow recovery attempts.

Trading conditions favor patience and selective entries rather than aggressive positioning. Short-term traders may look for rejection patterns near 1.1374 to engage in fade setups, while bullish continuation would require a sustained reclaim above the SMA20 with volume confirmation. Risk management remains essential given tight range compression, as breakout moves could be swift once volatility returns. Both sides require confirmation before commitment.
